data.content: Implemented the bulk terminal-state select reset so Shipped, Abandoned, and Deferred can be applied repeatedly during multi-select. Added a regression assertion for the key-based remount behavior. Validation in /private/tmp/foolery-62fa-impl-20260317: bun run lint (pre-existing warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build, plus focused bulk-edit-terminal-states test. Branch: work/foolery-62fa-impl-20260317. Commit: 48e2e21ec1ee.
